feature.title: Coupon application
feature.summary: Eligible returning customers can apply one coupon to a cart.

requirements.text: A valid coupon reduces the eligible cart total.
An invalid coupon does not change the cart total.

assumptions: The staging coupon SAVE10 is reserved for automated testing.

cases.title: Returning customer applies a valid coupon
preconditions: The cart contains one coupon-eligible in-stock item.
testData: Unique cart owned by this test run

steps.action: Open the cart and record the original total.
steps.expected: The cart shows the eligible item and original total.
The coupon is shown as applied and the total is reduced according to the documented rule.

cleanup: Delete the unique test cart through the existing test-data fixture.

cases.title: Invalid coupon leaves the cart total unchanged
preconditions: The cart contains one coupon-eligible in-stock item.
testData: Unique cart owned by this test run

steps.action: Open the cart and record the original total.
steps.expected: The cart shows the eligible item and original total.
A validation error appears and the original total remains unchanged.

cleanup: Delete the unique test cart through the existing test-data fixture.
